title: Query
description: A query defines a data request against a LookML model. Queries are immutable once created and contain the model, view, fields, filters, sorts, and limit needed to generate SQL and retrieve results.

id.description: Unique numeric identifier for this query

fields.description: List of field names to include in the query results (e.g. orders.count, users.created_date)

pivots.description: List of field names to pivot on

fill_fields.description: Fields to fill missing date values for

filters.description: Key-value map of filter expressions. Keys are field names and values are Looker filter expressions.

filter_expression.description: Custom filter expression using Looker filter syntax

sorts.description: Sort order for results. Each item is a field name optionally followed by asc or desc.

limit.description: Maximum number of rows to return (as string)

column_limit.description: Maximum number of columns for pivoted results

dynamic_fields.description: JSON string of dynamic field definitions

client_id.description: Client-generated hash of the query for caching

slug.description: Short unique URL slug for this query

url.description: Relative URL for this query in the Looker UI

has_table_calculations.description: Whether this query has table calculations
